steps.title: Find the consumer price
steps.content:
The consumer price is $280\%$ of $4.50$, so multiply by $2.80$.
$$4.50(2.80)=12.60$$

steps.title: Apply the discount
steps.content: A $65\%$ discount means the remaining price is $35\%$ of the consumer price. $$12.60(0.35)=4.41$$ The answer is 4.41.
